title: diamond stonks
description: makes you able to craft diamonds into more diamonds
body:
# cool title to look professional
This datapack makes it so you can craft 1 diamond into 2 diamonds
This won't ruin your experience right?

I also did 2 into 4, 3 into 6, 4 into 8 etc. becouse it's just nice to have and I'm lazy.
I added this once to an smp without telling my friends and we had a good laugh.
That's really all I have to say. Good luck! And remember, stonks!
# features
crafing diamands itno diamnsds 👍

![the title...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57d8714ff7eee457e64667c6821ecb4b937330d9_0.webp)

^^^ this was made in gimp. It's free software! And can create such ART!
